message:
feat(fsqlite-harness): implement golden-file test oracle harness (bd-1daa)

Add oracle.rs module with C sqlite3 comparison framework:
- JSON fixture format with ops (open/exec/query) and divergence annotations
- Single-process sqlite3 execution via stdin with sentinel-delimited output
- Line-number-based stderr error matching for accurate error attribution
- Normalization: float tolerance (1e-12), multiset comparison, error categories
- SLT ingestion pipeline for SQLite Logic Test format conversion
- 12 golden-file conformance fixtures covering basic SQL operations
- 17 unit tests all passing including E2E conformance suite

Also fixes fsqlite-mvcc PageBuf import (was referencing fsqlite_types instead
of fsqlite_pager) and enables serde_json preserve_order for correct column
ordering in JSON output parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+{
+  "id": "001_basic_create_insert_select",
+  "description": "Basic table creation, insert, and select",
+  "ops": [
+    { "op": "open", "path": ":memory:" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER, b TEXT)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t1 VALUES(1, 'hello')" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t1 VALUES(2, 'world')" },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT a, b FROM t1 ORDER BY a", "expect": { "columns": ["a", "b"], "rows": [["1", "hello"], ["2", "world"]], "ordered": true } }
+  ],
+  "fsqlite_modes": ["compatibility", "native"]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+{
+  "id": "002_null_handling",
+  "description": "NULL value handling in comparisons and aggregates",
+  "ops": [
+    { "op": "open", "path": ":memory:" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "CREATE TABLE t2(a INTEGER, b TEXT)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t2 VALUES(1, NULL)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t2 VALUES(NULL, 'hello')" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t2 VALUES(NULL, NULL)" },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t2", "expect": { "rows": [["3"]], "ordered": true } },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT COUNT(a) FROM t2", "expect": { "rows": [["1"]], "ordered": true } },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT a IS NULL FROM t2 ORDER BY rowid", "expect": { "rows": [["0"], ["1"], ["1"]], "ordered": true } }
+  ],
+  "fsqlite_modes": ["compatibility", "native"]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+{
+  "id": "003_unique_constraint",
+  "description": "UNIQUE constraint violation detection",
+  "ops": [
+    { "op": "open", "path": ":memory:" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "CREATE TABLE t3(a INTEGER UNIQUE, b TEXT)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t3 VALUES(1, 'first')" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t3 VALUES(1, 'duplicate')", "expect_error": "CONSTRAINT" }
+  ],
+  "fsqlite_modes": ["compatibility", "native"]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+{
+  "id": "004_type_affinity",
+  "description": "SQLite type affinity rules: numeric string stored in TEXT column",
+  "ops": [
+    { "op": "open", "path": ":memory:" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "CREATE TABLE t4(a TEXT, b INTEGER, c REAL)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t4 VALUES('123', '456', '7.89')" },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT typeof(a), typeof(b), typeof(c) FROM t4", "expect": { "rows": [["text", "integer", "real"]], "ordered": true } },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT a, b, c FROM t4", "expect": { "ordered": true } }
+  ],
+  "fsqlite_modes": ["compatibility", "native"]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+{
+  "id": "005_aggregate_functions",
+  "description": "Aggregate functions: SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX, GROUP_CONCAT",
+  "ops": [
+    { "op": "open", "path": ":memory:" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "CREATE TABLE t5(category TEXT, value INTEGER)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t5 VALUES('A', 10)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t5 VALUES('A', 20)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t5 VALUES('B', 30)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t5 VALUES('B', 40)" },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT category, SUM(value) FROM t5 GROUP BY category ORDER BY category", "expect": { "rows": [["A", "30"], ["B", "70"]], "ordered": true } },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT MIN(value), MAX(value), AVG(value) FROM t5", "expect": { "ordered": true } }
+  ],
+  "fsqlite_modes": ["compatibility", "native"]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+{
+  "id": "006_join_basic",
+  "description": "Basic INNER JOIN and LEFT JOIN",
+  "ops": [
+    { "op": "open", "path": ":memory:" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "CREATE TABLE users(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "CREATE TABLE orders(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, amount INTEGER)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO users VALUES(1, 'Alice')" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO users VALUES(2, 'Bob')" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO users VALUES(3, 'Carol')" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO orders VALUES(1, 1, 100)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO orders VALUES(2, 1, 200)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO orders VALUES(3, 2, 150)" },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id ORDER BY u.name, o.amount", "expect": { "rows": [["Alice", "100"], ["Alice", "200"], ["Bob", "150"]], "ordered": true } },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id ORDER BY u.name, o.amount", "expect": { "ordered": true, "row_count": 4 } }
+  ],
+  "fsqlite_modes": ["compatibility", "native"]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+{
+  "id": "007_subquery",
+  "description": "Subqueries: scalar, IN, EXISTS",
+  "ops": [
+    { "op": "open", "path": ":memory:" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "CREATE TABLE t7(a INTEGER, b TEXT)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t7 VALUES(1, 'one')" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t7 VALUES(2, 'two')" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t7 VALUES(3, 'three')" },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT a FROM t7 WHERE a IN (SELECT a FROM t7 WHERE a > 1) ORDER BY a", "expect": { "rows": [["2"], ["3"]], "ordered": true } },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT (SELECT MAX(a) FROM t7)", "expect": { "rows": [["3"]], "ordered": true } },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT a FROM t7 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t7 AS t WHERE t.a = t7.a AND t.a > 2) ORDER BY a", "expect": { "rows": [["3"]], "ordered": true } }
+  ],
+  "fsqlite_modes": ["compatibility", "native"]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+{
+  "id": "008_update_delete",
+  "description": "UPDATE and DELETE statements with WHERE clause",
+  "ops": [
+    { "op": "open", "path": ":memory:" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "CREATE TABLE t8(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, val TEXT)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t8 VALUES(1, 'original')" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t8 VALUES(2, 'keep')" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t8 VALUES(3, 'remove')" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "UPDATE t8 SET val = 'modified' WHERE id = 1" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "DELETE FROM t8 WHERE id = 3" },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT id, val FROM t8 ORDER BY id", "expect": { "rows": [["1", "modified"], ["2", "keep"]], "ordered": true } }
+  ],
+  "fsqlite_modes": ["compatibility", "native"]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+{
+  "id": "009_expressions_and_functions",
+  "description": "Built-in functions and expressions: COALESCE, IFNULL, CASE, LENGTH, UPPER",
+  "ops": [
+    { "op": "open", "path": ":memory:" },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT COALESCE(NULL, NULL, 'fallback')", "expect": { "rows": [["fallback"]], "ordered": true } },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT IFNULL(NULL, 42)", "expect": { "rows": [["42"]], "ordered": true } },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT CASE WHEN 1 > 0 THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END", "expect": { "rows": [["yes"]], "ordered": true } },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT LENGTH('hello')", "expect": { "rows": [["5"]], "ordered": true } },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT UPPER('hello'), LOWER('WORLD')", "expect": { "rows": [["HELLO", "world"]], "ordered": true } }
+  ],
+  "fsqlite_modes": ["compatibility", "native"]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+{
+  "id": "010_index_and_ordering",
+  "description": "Index creation and ORDER BY with ASC/DESC",
+  "ops": [
+    { "op": "open", "path": ":memory:" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "CREATE TABLE t10(a INTEGER, b TEXT)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "CREATE INDEX idx_t10_a ON t10(a)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t10 VALUES(3, 'c')" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t10 VALUES(1, 'a')" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t10 VALUES(2, 'b')" },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT a, b FROM t10 ORDER BY a ASC", "expect": { "rows": [["1", "a"], ["2", "b"], ["3", "c"]], "ordered": true } },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT a, b FROM t10 ORDER BY a DESC", "expect": { "rows": [["3", "c"], ["2", "b"], ["1", "a"]], "ordered": true } }
+  ],
+  "fsqlite_modes": ["compatibility", "native"]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+{
+  "id": "011_transactions_rollback",
+  "description": "Transaction COMMIT and ROLLBACK behavior",
+  "ops": [
+    { "op": "open", "path": ":memory:" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "CREATE TABLE t11(a INTEGER)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "BEGIN" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t11 VALUES(1)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t11 VALUES(2)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "ROLLBACK" },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t11", "expect": { "rows": [["0"]], "ordered": true } },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "BEGIN" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO t11 VALUES(10)" },
+    { "op": "exec", "sql": "COMMIT" },
+    { "op": "query", "sql": "SELECT a FROM t11", "expect": { "rows": [["10"]], "ordered": true } }
+  ],
+  "fsqlite_modes": ["compatibility", "native"]
+}
